---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dror-berel
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://drorberel.github.io/
---

Work in progress...

check out <https://drorberel.github.io/> page
